user_query:
Please do the following and save all outputs under output/:

1) Read input/entities.json for the list of crypto entities (tokens/projects) and narratives to analyze, plus any optional time ranges. Produce mindshare analyses for each item using a 12-month window by default: compute weekly averages, the current level, and the 12-month high/low/average. For entities, include a rank interpretation category (Top 10 = dominant, Top 20 = strong, Top 50 = moderate, >50 = weak). For narratives, compute the percent change over the time range and classify movement as surging (>= +10%), fading (<= -10%), or stable (within ±10%). If a ticker returns all-zero data, retry using the full project name from the same file. Save structured results to output/mindshare/entities.json and output/mindshare/narratives.json, and write a concise human-readable summary to output/mindshare/summary.md.

2) Read input/proposal.md (an investment strategy proposal) and run a multi-perspective adversarial evaluation that culminates in a GO/NO-GO/REWORK ruling. The report must have 10 sections: participants table, per-agent summaries, process highlights, consensus points, disputes/contradictions with rulings, final plan with numbers, scenario projections (bull/base/bear with probabilities), retained doubts, ruling, and P0/P1/P2 action items with owners and deadlines. Save the full report to output/war_room/report.md.

3) Read input/signals_config.json for thresholds and compile today’s high-conviction ETF signals filtered by those values. Save the ranked signals with fields ticker, direction, signal_strength, avg_confidence, suggested_action, and top_thesis to output/signals/signals.json. Also write a brief market summary to output/signals/market_summary.md. Create a disclaimer file at output/signals/disclaimer.txt that states exactly: "AI-generated, not financial advice".

4) Draft a marketplace listing JSON manifest for a combined "Mindshare + Signals Strategy Assistant". Include fields: name, emoji, category (one of: tool, workflow, integration, creative, data, communication), description, version (semantic versioning), and tags (non-empty array). Save to output/marketplace/skill_manifest.json.

5) Write an integrated strategy memo that cross-references the mindshare analyses and the signals to recommend whether to pivot the portfolio toward any narrative or entity. Make this memo 800–1200 words and save to output/memo.md.
